TIAMATBEAST-CHAOS_TIDE.title: Chaos Tide
TIAMATBEAST-CARAPACE.title: Carapace
TIAMATBEAST-SPAWN_LAHMU.title: Spawn Laḫmu
TIAMATBEAST-BLACK_MUD.title: Black Mud
TIAMATBEAST-BLACK_MUD.description: #Apply !Curse! Curse to an enemy. Gain !Nurture! Nurture.
TIAMATBEAST-SUCKLE.title: Suckle
TIAMATBEAST-SUCKLE.description: #Gain !Nurture! Nurture. If you have 3 or more Laḫmu, draw 1 card.
TIAMATBEAST-MITOSIS.title: Mitosis
TIAMATBEAST-MITOSIS.description: #Devour 1 Laḫmu: deal !D! damage, plus !PerNurture! for each Nurture. Then spawn 1 Laḫmu.
TIAMATBEAST-BLACK_DELUGE.title: Black Deluge
TIAMATBEAST-BLACK_DELUGE.description: #Apply !Curse! Curse to ALL enemies. Gain !Nurture! Nurture for each enemy cursed.
TIAMATBEAST-ELEVEN_BEL_LAHMU.title: Eleven Bel Laḫmu
TIAMATBEAST-ELEVEN_BEL_LAHMU.description: #Spawn up to !Lahmu! Laḫmu. Gain Nurture equal to your Laḫmu in play. Gain !NpCharge! NP Charge.
TIAMATBEAST-BROKEN_HORN.title: Broken Horn
TIAMATBEAST-BROKEN_HORN.description: #Devour ALL your Laḫmu. For each one devoured, deal !PerHorn! damage to ALL enemies, increased by !PerNurture! per Nurture. Gain !NpPerLahmu! NP Charge per Laḫmu.
TIAMATBEAST-ENUMA_ELIS.title: Enūma Eliš
TIAMATBEAST-ENUMA_ELIS.description: #Playable at !ChargeCost! NP Charge. Consume ALL NP Charge, refill your Laḫmu, then deal !D! damage to ALL enemies plus !PerLahmu! per Laḫmu, increased by !PerNurture! per Nurture and !PerTen! per 10 NP over !ChargeCost!.
